title: Blush Bloom is here
summary: A soft, playful new light theme is now available in Shadow Chat with pearl blush glass, berry accents, lavender haze, peach highlights, and mint shimmer.

sections.heading: New Theme
items: Blush Bloom adds a bright pearl-and-pink look with berry controls, lavender/peach glow, and subtle mint shimmer.
The theme includes generated backdrop, texture, and picker preview assets so it feels distinct across login, chat, settings, and popups.
The theme picker now has room for six full theme cards on phone and desktop layouts.

sections.heading: Where To Find It
items: Open Settings, then Color & Layout, and select Blush Bloom from the theme cards.
The launch popup itself uses the Blush Bloom styling so you can preview the new look before switching.

sections.heading: Restart Required
items: Restarting or refreshing makes sure the new theme assets, picker layout, and popup styling load together.
Older app sessions will be prompted to restart before continuing.
